title: Ecommerce Website
description: A mock ecommerce platform built to demonstrate my full-stack development skills. The application features backend-driven product management, order handling, and a functional cart system, showcasing how data flows between the frontend and backend. It also includes basic OAuth authentication principles, highlighting user login and security fundamentals within a modern web application.

title: Task App
description: A task management application developed as part of my Personal Development Plan to learn full-stack mobile development. Built using React Native with a backend integration, the app allows users to create, manage, and track tasks, demonstrating my understanding of connecting frontend mobile interfaces with backend services.

title: Smart Time Registration
description: A smart time tracking solution that imports calendar data and links entries to projects, featuring secure Microsoft authentication and organizational insights.

title: StreamFlix
description: A full-stack streaming platform inspired by Netflix, offering user authentication, personalized watchlists, and API-driven content delivery.

title: Bin There, Done That
description: An interactive web app designed to educate users on waste separation and sustainability through engaging, game-based learning experiences.

title: SSM Product Passport Tracking
description: A comprehensive group project focused on building a product passport tracking system. The application centralizes and structures product data, allowing users to monitor lifecycle information, sustainability metrics, and supply chain transparency. It implements UNS-inspired principles for data organization, making it easier for manufacturers, suppliers, and consumers to access and verify product details throughout the supply chain. The system is designed to improve traceability, accountability, and trust in product sourcing and movement across industries.

title: NHL Stenden Explorer
description: NHL Stenden Explorer is a web application designed to help students, staff, parents, and visitors explore the Emmen campus virtually. The app’s main goal is to make campus information and navigation easy and accessible for everyone. It features an interactive 360-degree photo viewer, allowing users to visually tour the facilities and learn how to get around. With always-available access, the app enhances the campus experience by providing important details and a virtual guide for all users.
image1description: In the project, we used a 360 degree camera to integrate a 360 photo viewer so users could explore our campus locations through the website and get a clear understanding of the surroundings of the campus.
image2description: Because our main goal was to provide information and views of the campus, we also created a faq Page
